name: Elf
summary: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in places of ethereal beauty, in the midst of ancient forests or in silvery spires glittering with faerie light, where soft music drifts through the air and gentle fragrances waft on the breeze. Elves love nature and magic, art and artistry, music and poetry.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Elves range from under 5 to over 6 feet tall and have slender builds. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 30 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and Elven.

coreBonuses: Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2.
Size.Elves range from under 5 to over 6 feet tall and have slender builds. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 30 feet.
Languages.You can speak, read, and write Common and Elven.
Ability Score Increase.Your Charisma score increases by 1.
Ability Score Increase.Your Intelligence score increases by 1.
Ability Score Increase.Your Wisdom score increases by 1.
Ability Score Increase.Your Wisdom score increases by 1.

coreTraits.name: Age
coreTraits.summary: Although elves reach physical maturity at about the same age as humans, the elven understanding of adulthood goes beyond physical growth to encompass worldly experience. An elf typically claims adulthood and an adult name around the age of 100 and can live to be 750 years old.

coreTraits.name: Alignment
coreTraits.summary: Elves love freedom, variety, and self-expression, so they lean strongly towards the gentler aspects of chaos. They value and protect others' freedom as well as their own, and are good more often than not. Drow are an exception; their exile into the Underdark has made them vicious and dangerous. Drow are more often evil than not.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: Accustomed to twilit forests and the night sky, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

coreTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
coreTraits.summary: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

coreTraits.name: Trance
coreTraits.summary: Elves do not sleep. Instead they meditate deeply, remaining semi-conscious, for 4 hours a day. The Common word for this meditation is "trance." While meditating, you dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises that have become reflexive after years of practice. After resting in this way, you gain the same benefit a human would from 8 hours of sleep.

coreTraits.name: Keen Senses
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

coreTraits.name: Superior Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: Your darkvision has a range of 120 feet, instead of 60.

coreTraits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
coreTraits.summary: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when you, the target of the attack, or whatever you are trying to perceive is in direct sunlight.

coreTraits.name: Drow Magic
coreTraits.summary: You know theDancing Lightscantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast theFaerie Firespell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. When you reach 5th level, you can cast theDarknessspell once and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

coreTraits.name: Drow Weapon Training
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

notes: raw text is preserved in page.txt for manual inspection
subrace extraction is heuristic; inspect outputs for edge cases
